metadata.title: Home Renewal | Buy, sell and renovate properties
metadata.description: Buying, selling and renovation under one roof. Property buy-outs, complete renovations and brokerage.

hero.subtitle: HOME RENEWAL
hero.title: Buy, sell and renovate — all in one place
hero.description: We buy your property, fully renovate it or broker the sale. Everything under one roof — without any worries on your side.

sections.label: WHAT WE DO
sections.title: Three paths, one certainty
sections.description: Whether you want to sell, buy or renovate — we handle everything from A to Z.

sell.title: I want to sell
sell.description: Property buy-out, complete renovation with a follow-up sale, or brokerage. Pick the option that suits you best.

buy.title: I want to buy
buy.description: Current listings of vetted properties, before/after showcases and financing support. We guide you through the entire process.

renovate.title: Full renovation
renovate.description: We handle the whole process from A to Z. Our own team, premium standards and unique concrete screeds.

step1.title: Consultation
step1.description: We listen to your ideas and propose the best collaboration option.

step2.title: Offer & design
step2.description: Transparent pricing, schedule and visuals — all in one document.

step3.title: Realization
step3.description: Our own crew under the supervision of a project manager and site lead.

step4.title: Handover
step4.description: We deliver the finished property in agreed quality, time and budget.

listings.label: CURRENT OFFER
listings.title: Current property listings
listings.description: Vetted apartments and houses from our workshop — ready to move in.

newsletter.label: NEWSLETTER
newsletter.title: Don't miss our new properties
newsletter.description: We send tips on freshly finished apartments before they hit the public real-estate portals.
newsletter.consent: By submitting you agree with the processing of personal data.

homeContact.label: CONTACT
homeContact.title: Get in touch
homeContact.description: Have a question or a specific plan? We typically reply within 24 hours.

footer.description: Buying, selling and renovating properties — all in one place.

hero.label: I WANT TO SELL
hero.title: Three ways to sell your property
hero.description: Pick the option that fits you best. With variants A and B we take care of absolutely everything — you don't have to lift a finger.

intro.title: Your property, our concern
intro.description: We specialize in complex services — buying out apartments, fully renovating them and selling them on. If you prefer brokerage only, we do that too.

variants.title: Compare collaboration options
variants.description: Pick a variant based on how much you want to handle yourself and how quickly you need the money.

b.name: Variant B
b.subtitle: Renovation + sale
b.cta: I want to upgrade my property

step1.title: Free meeting
step1.description: We visit the property and discuss your goals.

step2.title: Tailored proposal
step2.description: We prepare a buy-out offer, renovation plan or sales strategy.

step3.title: Contract
step3.description: We sign a clear agreement with fair conditions.

step4.title: Execution
step4.description: We handle everything — from paperwork to land registry.

form.title: I want to sell
form.description: Fill in the form and we'll get back with a proposal for a free meeting.

hero.label: I WANT TO BUY
hero.title: Find your new home
hero.description: Current listings of fully renovated, vetted properties. No hidden flaws, no compromises.

listings.title: Current offer
listings.description: Choose from apartments and houses we have personally renovated. You always know exactly what you're buying.

beforeAfter.label: BEFORE & AFTER
beforeAfter.title: Showcase of our renovations
beforeAfter.description: See how we transform even the oldest flats into modern living spaces.

process.title: How it works with us
process.description: We guide you through the whole journey — from the first viewing to the keys handover.

step1.title: Property choice
step1.description: Together we'll pick the right one from our current offer. Personal viewing welcome.

step2.title: Reservation
step2.description: After signing the reservation contract, we pull the property off the market.

step3.title: Financing
step3.description: We help with mortgages or loans from our partners.

step4.title: Keys handover
step4.description: Once the purchase contract is signed and money transferred, you get the keys.

financing.label: FINANCING
financing.title: We help you with financing
financing.description: We work with vetted mortgage brokers and banks. We find the best terms for you with zero hassle.

cta.title: Like one of the properties?
cta.description: Book a non-binding viewing — and be quick. Our flats sell within days.

hero.label: FULL RENOVATION
hero.title: We handle the whole process from A to Z
hero.description: Our own crew, premium standards and fair pricing. We deliver the finished renovation on time and on budget.

intro.title: One team, one accountability
intro.description: We don't outsource — we manage everything ourselves. From the architectural design through to handover. You have one contact manager who is responsible for the result.

apartments.title: Apartments
apartments.description: We can complete a full apartment renovation in as little as 6 weeks — at a standard we consider truly premium.

houses.title: Family houses
houses.description: Professional renovation of family houses — from layout to facade.

commercial.title: Commercial spaces
commercial.description: Offices, shops, gastro venues. Fast, efficient, no compromises.

attic.title: Attic conversions
attic.description: We turn unused attic space into full-fledged living with high comfort.

standards.title: Our standards & technical solutions
standards.description: We work with vetted suppliers and brands we recommend for our own homes.
items: Floors, tiles and cladding — premium brands

step1.title: Free meeting
step1.description: We visit the space, learn your goals and possibilities.

step2.title: Design & quote
step2.description: An architect prepares the layout, visuals and a transparent budget.

step3.title: Realization
step3.description: Our own crew works under the site supervisor.

step4.title: Handover
step4.description: We hand over a clean, inspected space with warranty.

concreteScreeds.label: CONCRETE SCREEDS
concreteScreeds.title: Specialists in concrete screeds
concreteScreeds.description: As one of the few on the market, we offer premium decorative concrete screeds for floors, walls and furniture. Seamless surface, high durability and timeless look.

cta.title: Planning a renovation?
cta.description: Book a free consultation. We'll happily come over and advise.

hero.label: CONCRETE SCREEDS
hero.title: Premium concrete screeds
hero.description: Unique surface treatment for modern interiors and exteriors. Seamless, durable and aesthetically timeless.

seamless.title: Seamless surface
seamless.description: No joints, no transitions. Clean minimalist look for your space.

durable.title: High durability
durable.description: Extremely resistant to wear, water and chemicals. Lifespan of decades.

design.title: Design flexibility
design.description: Wide range of colors and textures. Every realization is a unique work of art.

maintenance.title: Easy maintenance
maintenance.description: Minimal maintenance requirements. Regular cleaning products are sufficient.

cta.title: Interested in concrete screeds?
cta.description: We'll happily prepare a non-binding custom quote.

hero.label: ABOUT US
hero.title: We build as if we wanted to live there ourselves
hero.description: Home Renewal is a team that combines renovations, real-estate services and unique concrete screeds under one roof.

story.title: Our philosophy
story.p1: We were founded to change how apartments are sold and renovated in the Czech Republic. We combine craftsmanship, design and transparent business.
story.p2: Every project has one accountable manager from the first meeting to handover. No middlemen, no blaming subcontractors — because we are the team that builds and runs them.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We work with brands and materials we'd choose for our own home.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Fair prices, clear contracts, no hidden fees or surprises.

responsibility.title: Accountability
responsibility.description: We keep our word, deadlines and budget. That's a given for us.

partner.label: PART OF THE GROUP
partner.title: Part of Pazderka Management
partner.description: We are part of the Pazderka Management group — an experienced partner in property management and development. Together we deliver complex service even on large projects.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: We'll be happy to answer any questions.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Message sent. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.consent: By submitting the form you agree with the processing of personal data.
